assertions.reason: `cargo test --test conversations_contract_mock -- --nocapture` exited 0 and passed `crud_and_path_guards`, which exercised conversation create/retrieve/update/delete, verified metadata and initial items in the captured create body, asserted the delete response returned `{object: "conversation.deleted", deleted: true}`, and rejected blank `conversation_id` values locally.

`cargo test --test conversations_items_contract_mock -- --nocapture` exited 0 and passed `routes_and_pagination`, which proved item create/retrieve/list/delete route handling, forwarded `after`/`limit`/`order`/`include`, returned typed list-envelope pagination helpers, returned the updated conversation resource from delete, and rejected blank conversation/item ids locally; the same test binary also passed `typed_known_fields_are_not_lost`, reinforcing stable typed item decoding.

`cargo test --test responses_parse_contract -- --nocapture` exited 0 and passed `parse_returns_typed_output_and_strict_tool_arguments`, `multi_block_structured_output_parses_from_canonical_parts`, and `parse_surfaces_explicit_refusal_and_parse_failures`, proving non-stream structured parsing yields typed output and strict tool arguments on success while refusals and malformed structured output surface explicit parse errors.

`cargo test --test responses_input_tokens_contract -- --nocapture` exited 0 and passed `input_tokens_count_forwards_modalities_and_tools`, showing `/responses/input_tokens` received text+image input plus strict function tools and returned the typed `response.input_tokens` payload with stable totals and details.

`cargo test --test responses_input_items_contract -- --nocapture` exited 0 and passed `input_items_list_exposes_typed_items_and_cursor_termination`, which verified `response_id` validation, forwarding of `after`/`include`/`limit`/`order`, typed input-item decoding across two pages, and clean cursor termination when `has_more=false`.

commands.observation: `conversations_contract_mock` ran 1 test and passed `crud_and_path_guards`, covering conversation CRUD request paths, metadata/item request-body capture, delete marker decoding, and blank-id local validation.

`conversations_items_contract_mock` ran 2 tests and passed `routes_and_pagination` plus `typed_known_fields_are_not_lost`, proving item-route query forwarding, typed pagination envelopes, delete-returned conversation resources, local path guards, and preservation of known typed item fields.
`responses_parse_contract` ran 3 tests and passed typed structured-output extraction, canonical multi-block parsing, and explicit refusal/invalid-JSON parse-error handling.
`responses_input_tokens_contract` ran 1 test and passed `input_tokens_count_forwards_modalities_and_tools`, confirming serialized multimodal/tool request shaping and typed token-count decoding.

`responses_input_items_contract` ran 1 test and passed `input_items_list_exposes_typed_items_and_cursor_termination`, confirming query forwarding, typed item decoding, blank-id rejection, and cursor termination across two pages.

summary: Ran the assigned mocked cargo validations successfully. VAL-RESP-011 through VAL-RESP-015 are all supported by passing test output captured under the mission evidence directory.
